questions.text: 当有生物误闯入你的领地时，你第一反应是什么？
questions.text_en: When a creature accidentally enters your territory, what is your first reaction?

options.label: 立即警告并准备战斗
options.label_en: Immediately warn and prepare for battle

options.label: 先观察对方意图再决定
options.label_en: Observe their intentions first, then decide

options.label: 愿意和平交流或给予指引
options.label_en: Willing to communicate peacefully or give guidance

questions.text: 你认为作为一条龙最重要的是什么？
questions.text_en: What do you think is most important as a dragon?

options.label: 力量和威严
options.label_en: Power and majesty

options.label: 智慧和策略
options.label_en: Wisdom and strategy

options.label: 自由和善良
options.label_en: Freedom and kindness

questions.text: 面对比你强大的对手，你会如何应对？
questions.text_en: How would you handle an opponent stronger than you?

options.label: 寻找对方弱点进行突袭
options.label_en: Find their weakness and launch a surprise attack

options.label: 制定周密计划再行动
options.label_en: Make a detailed plan before acting

options.label: 寻求盟友或避其锋芒
options.label_en: Seek allies or avoid direct confrontation

questions.text: 你如何看待自己在龙族中的地位？
questions.text_en: How do you view your status among dragonkind?

options.label: 渴望成为最强的龙族领袖
options.label_en: Desire to become the strongest dragon leader

options.label: 希望通过实力赢得尊重
options.label_en: Hope to earn respect through ability

options.label: 更在意内在修养而非地位
options.label_en: More concerned with inner cultivation than status

questions.text: 对于你的宝藏，你希望如何展示？
questions.text_en: How would you like to display your hoard?

options.label: 深埋在隐秘的洞穴中
options.label_en: Deeply buried in a secret cave

options.label: 只让值得信任的人看见
options.label_en: Only show to trustworthy individuals

options.label: 愿意与有价值的人分享
options.label_en: Willing to share with valuable individuals

questions.text: 有人想要从你的宝藏中取走一件物品，你会怎么想？
questions.text_en: Someone wants to take one item from your hoard, what would you think?

options.label: 绝对不允许，那是我的一切
options.label_en: Absolutely not allowed, that's everything to me

options.label: 看对方是否有足够的诚意和理由
options.label_en: See if they have enough sincerity and reason

options.label: 如果对方需要，愿意给予
options.label_en: Willing to give if they truly need it

questions.text: 遇到其他龙时，你更倾向的交往方式是？
questions.text_en: When meeting other dragons, what's your preferred way of interacting?

options.label: 保持警惕和距离
options.label_en: Keep alert and maintain distance

options.label: 礼貌交往但不过多深入
options.label_en: Polite interaction without getting too deep

options.label: 热情交流，建立友谊
options.label_en: Enthusiastic communication to build friendship

questions.text: 如果有弱小的生物寻求你的帮助，你会？
questions.text_en: If a weak creature seeks your help, what would you do?

options.label: 视情况决定是否理会
options.label_en: Decide whether to respond based on the situation

options.label: 观察对方是否值得帮助
options.label_en: Observe if they are worth helping

options.label: 伸出援手，慷慨相助
options.label_en: Extend help generously

questions.text: 在战斗中，你更倾向于哪种风格？
questions.text_en: In combat, which style do you prefer?

options.label: 直接正面猛攻
options.label_en: Direct frontal assault

options.label: 利用环境和陷阱智取
options.label_en: Use environment and traps strategically

options.label: 尽量避免战斗，寻求和平解决
options.label_en: Avoid combat if possible, seek peaceful solution

questions.text: 使用龙息时，你更注重什么？
questions.text_en: When using your breath weapon, what do you focus on?

options.label: 追求最大的破坏力
options.label_en: Pursue maximum destructive power

options.label: 精准打击关键目标
options.label_en: Precise strike on key targets

options.label: 威慑为主，避免真正伤害
options.label_en: Deterrence first, avoid real harm

questions.text: 对于自己的领地，你希望如何管理？
questions.text_en: How would you like to manage your territory?

options.label: 绝对统治，不许任何生物侵犯
options.label_en: Absolute rule, no creature intrusion allowed

options.label: 建立规则，允许有序进入
options.label_en: Establish rules, allow orderly entry

options.label: 开放领地，与其他生物和谐共存
options.label_en: Open territory, coexist harmoniously with others

questions.text: 当领地受到威胁时，你会？
questions.text_en: When your territory is threatened, what would you do?

options.label: 立即反击，不惜一切代价
options.label_en: Immediate counterattack at any cost

options.label: 评估威胁程度，有策略地应对
options.label_en: Assess threat level and respond strategically

options.label: 寻求和平解决，避免流血冲突
options.label_en: Seek peaceful resolution, avoid bloodshed

questions.text: 你更喜欢通过什么方式获得知识？
questions.text_en: Which way do you prefer to gain knowledge?

options.label: 实践和经验
options.label_en: Practice and experience

options.label: 观察和分析
options.label_en: Observation and analysis

options.label: 研究和冥想
options.label_en: Research and meditation

questions.text: 面对复杂问题时，你更依赖什么？
questions.text_en: When facing complex problems, what do you rely on more?

options.label: 直觉和本能
options.label_en: Intuition and instinct

options.label: 逻辑和推理
options.label_en: Logic and reasoning

options.label: 智慧和洞察
options.label_en: Wisdom and insight

questions.text: 你如何表达自己的情感？
questions.text_en: How do you express your emotions?

options.label: 直接而强烈地表达
options.label_en: Express directly and intensely

options.label: 有节制地表达，看场合
options.label_en: Express moderately depending on the situation

options.label: 内敛而深沉，不轻易表露
options.label_en: Restrained and deep, not easily revealed

questions.text: 当看到其他龙陷入困境时，你会？
questions.text_en: When you see another dragon in trouble, what would you do?

options.label: 观望情况，不轻易介入
options.label_en: Watch the situation, not easily intervene

options.label: 权衡利弊后决定是否帮助
options.label_en: Weigh pros and cons before deciding to help

options.label: 立即伸出援手
options.label_en: Immediately extend help

questions.text: 你认为善与恶的区别是什么？
questions.text_en: What do you think is the difference between good and evil?

options.label: 强弱之分，强者制定规则
options.label_en: Difference between strong and weak, the strong make rules

options.label: 秩序与混乱，各有其道理
options.label_en: Order and chaos, each has its reasoning

options.label: 利他与自私，以他人利益为先
options.label_en: Altruism vs selfishness, prioritize others' interests

questions.text: 看到不公正的事情时，你会如何反应？
questions.text_en: How would you react to seeing injustice?

options.label: 事不关己，高高挂起
options.label_en: Not my concern, stay out of it

options.label: 看情况决定是否介入
options.label_en: Decide whether to intervene based on the situation

options.label: 挺身而出，维护正义
options.label_en: Stand up and defend justice

questions.text: 对于未来，你有什么样的期待？
questions.text_en: What are your expectations for the future?

options.label: 成为最强大的龙，统治一切
options.label_en: Become the most powerful dragon, rule everything

options.label: 在龙族中获得重要地位
options.label_en: Gain important status among dragonkind

options.label: 追求内心的平静和智慧
options.label_en: Pursue inner peace and wisdom

questions.text: 面对能够提升自己力量的机会，你会？
questions.text_en: When faced with opportunities to increase your power, what would you do?

options.label: 不惜一切代价抓住机会
options.label_en: Seize the opportunity at any cost

options.label: 权衡利弊后谨慎尝试
options.label_en: Carefully try after weighing pros and cons

options.label: 如果违背原则则放弃
options.label_en: Give up if it goes against principles

questions.text: 做重要决定时，你通常会？
questions.text_en: When making important decisions, do you usually?

options.label: 果断迅速，不犹豫
options.label_en: Decisive and quick, no hesitation

options.label: 经过一定思考后决定
options.label_en: Decide after some thought

options.label: 深思熟虑，反复推敲
options.label_en: Deep consideration, repeated deliberation

questions.text: 如果发现之前的决定是错误的，你会？
questions.text_en: If you find a previous decision was wrong, would you?

options.label: 立即改变方向
options.label_en: Immediately change direction

options.label: 评估影响后再调整
options.label_en: Assess impact before adjusting

options.label: 分析原因，从中学习
options.label_en: Analyze reasons and learn from it

questions.text: 面对任务或目标，你更倾向的行动方式是？
questions.text_en: When facing tasks or goals, what's your preferred approach?

options.label: 立刻行动，边做边调整
options.label_en: Immediate action, adjust while doing

options.label: 制定计划，按步骤执行
options.label_en: Make plan, execute step by step

options.label: 先观察学习，再谨慎行动
options.label_en: Observe and learn first, then act cautiously

questions.text: 你更习惯的生活方式是？
questions.text_en: What lifestyle are you more accustomed to?

options.label: 主动出击，掌控局面
options.label_en: Proactive, control the situation

options.label: 有条不紊，按部就班
options.label_en: Orderly, proceed step by step

options.label: 顺其自然，随遇而安
options.label_en: Go with the flow, adapt to circumstances

questions.text: 在群体中，你更倾向于扮演什么角色？
questions.text_en: In a group, what role do you prefer to play?

options.label: 领导者，指挥大家
options.label_en: Leader, command everyone

options.label: 参与者，配合团队
options.label_en: Participant, cooperate with team

options.label: 观察者，默默支持
options.label_en: Observer, silently support

questions.text: 遇到陌生龙时，你的态度是？
questions.text_en: When meeting a strange dragon, what's your attitude?

options.label: 谨慎试探，保持距离
options.label_en: Cautious probing, maintain distance

options.label: 礼貌接触，逐步了解
options.label_en: Polite contact, gradually understand

options.label: 热情友好，快速建立联系
options.label_en: Warm and friendly, quickly establish connection

questions.text: 你如何处理与他人的关系界限？
questions.text_en: How do you handle boundaries with others?

options.label: 明确界限，不容侵犯
options.label_en: Clear boundaries, no violation allowed

options.label: 保持适度距离，互不干扰
options.label_en: Maintain moderate distance, don't interfere

options.label: 开放包容，乐于分享
options.label_en: Open and inclusive, happy to share

questions.text: 当他人过度依赖你时，你会？
questions.text_en: When others overly depend on you, what would you do?

options.label: 保持独立，不让人过度依赖
options.label_en: Maintain independence, don't let others over-depend

options.label: 适当帮助，但设立界限
options.label_en: Help appropriately but set boundaries

options.label: 慷慨支持，愿意成为依靠
options.label_en: Generous support, willing to be relied upon

questions.text: 在不同场合，你的表现如何？
questions.text_en: How do you behave in different situations?

options.label: 始终如一，本色出演
options.label_en: Always consistent, show true self

options.label: 略有调整，但保持主要特质
options.label_en: Slight adjustments but maintain main traits

options.label: 根据场合灵活改变
options.label_en: Flexibly change based on the situation

questions.text: 你如何处理自己的真实想法和外在表现的差异？
questions.text_en: How do you handle the difference between your true thoughts and external behavior?

options.label: 内外一致，不隐藏真实想法
options.label_en: Consistent inside and out, don't hide true thoughts

options.label: 有选择地表达部分想法
options.label_en: Selectively express some thoughts

options.label: 根据需要调整表达方式
options.label_en: Adjust expression based on needs
